questions.question: What is the main environmental concern associated with the production, consumption, and disposal of electronic devices (e-waste)?
Describe the difference between e-waste and hazardous waste. Which one poses a greater threat to the environment?
What is the definition of 'Circular Economy' in the context of e-waste management? Explain its significance in reducing waste and promoting sustainability.
questions.hint: Designing out waste, reusing materials, and recycling
